text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.42 — 61 PRs and hourly refills

The community went on an absolute shipping bender this week. 61 PRs merged. Here is what changed in the infrastructure to support it:

→ HOURLY REFILLS
Spore and Seed tier users now get hourly pollen refills via Cloudflare Cron. No more waiting until tomorrow because you accidentally left a while-loop running.

→ NEW MODELS
Added Qwen3.5 397B via Fireworks. We also shipped multipart endpoint support for Klein multi-image editing.

→ FRONTEND SPEED
Lazy-loading markdown, chunk splitting, and SWR caching. The enter page is noticeably faster. We also redesigned the model monitor so you can actually see what is happening under the hood.

→ API HARDENING
Invalidating KV cache when API key permissions change, and enforcing strict response content-type checks before SSE parsing. Boring but necessary.

→ THE SHOWCASE
Over 20 new community projects added, from AI city dioramas to ESP32 generators and Claude Code CLI plugins.

Everything is open source.
https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations

#OpenSource #AI #DevTools
